allow: Bash(sed 's/NVDA/IBM/g; s/NVIDIA/IBM/g; s/ppo_nvda_improved/ppo_ibm_improved/g; s/美股 IBM \(IBM\)/美股 IBM \(IBM Common Stock\)/g; s/NVDA_chart/IBM_chart/g' get_trading_signal_nvda.py)

Bash(sed 's/NVDA/SMCI/g; s/NVIDIA/Super Micro Computer/g; s/ppo_nvda_improved/ppo_smci_improved/g; s/美股 SMCI \(SMCI\)/美股 SMCI \(Super Micro Computer\)/g; s/NVDA_chart/SMCI_chart/g' get_trading_signal_nvda.py)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Silvi\\Projects\\trading-bot"; Write-Output "=== Checking model files ==="; Get-Item ppo_tsla_improved.zip, ppo_ba_improved.zip, ppo_amzn_improved.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, @{N='Size';E={[int]\($_.Length/1KB\)+'KB'}}; Write-Output "=== ARM model check ==="; Get-Item ppo_arm_improved.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime; Write-Output "=== IBM/SMCI/ORCL model check ==="; Get-Item ppo_ibm_improved.zip, ppo_smci_improved.zip, ppo_orcl_improved.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime)
